completed_tasks.name: Fix nested git repo (site/ as regular files)
UI redesign — hero, quotes, contact tiles, projects 2-col, floating dock
Dark mode — init script, globals.css overrides, Navbar toggle
Dark mode bug fix — Turbopack dropped CSS after unicode comment
CareVault project — screenshots, carousel card, dedicated /projects/[slug] page
Projects overhaul — Sentinel screenshots, Eval Teardown, InsurAgents, ResuAgent, Car Damage, remove Work projects
Fix Skills.tsx crash — colors map missing AI & Agents entry (c.header undefined)

remaining_tasks.name: vercel --prod deploy
remaining_tasks.note: requires user to run manually or explicitly authorize

remaining_tasks.name: update metadataBase URL in layout.tsx with real Vercel URL

blockers.description: vercel --prod blocked by auto-mode classifier — needs explicit user authorization or manual run

human_actions_pending.context: Deploy to production. After getting the live URL, update metadataBase in site/src/app/layout.tsx line 8.

decisions.decision: Screenshot carousel uses AnimatePresence slide animation, direction-aware
decisions.rationale: Polished feel, framer-motion already in project

decisions.decision: Explore button only shown on cards with screenshots array
decisions.rationale: User asked: only show where media exists

decisions.decision: Project detail at /projects/[slug] (new page, not modal)
Removed Work category projects (Motor Claims, AI Vehicle Inspection)
Sentinel Eval Teardown as separate project linking to /sentinel_teardown.pdf
decisions.rationale: User wanted PDF as its own project entry

decisions.decision: AI & Agents placed as first skills category
decisions.rationale: Highest relevance for PM role; showcases differentiator

decisions.decision: Unicode box-drawing chars in CSS comment caused Turbopack to drop all following CSS
decisions.rationale: Discovered via debugging — replaced with plain ASCII comment

decisions.decision: Skills.tsx colors map must include every category key in portfolio.ts skills object
decisions.rationale: Missing key returns undefined — accessing .header on undefined throws. Add new color entry whenever a new skills category is added to portfolio.ts.

next_action: Run vercel --prod from site/, then update metadataBase URL in layout.tsx with the live URL and redeploy.
context_notes: Site loads cleanly (200 OK) after fixing Skills.tsx crash. The crash was caused by the AI & Agents category being in portfolio.ts but not in the colors map in Skills.tsx. Fix is committed. Only deploy remains.
